{{Quote|Has Obi-Wan found the exploration vessel that was supposed to rendezvous at Mycroft yet?|[[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]]|<ref name="Rep69" />}}
'''Mycroft''' was a terrestrial [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Fakir sector/Legends|Fakir sector]]. The world hosted a variety of climates and terrains, ranging from low [[Mountain/Legends|mountains]] covered in [[Forest/Legends|forests]], arid [[Desert/Legends|deserts]], and frozen polar icecaps. Several dangerous [[Species/Legends|species]] inhabited Mycroft, including a [[Unidentified bear-like creature|bear-like creature]] and a [[Unidentified flying carnivore|flying carnivore]].<ref name="Assault" />

By the time of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], the [[Intergalactic Zoological Society]] was based on Mycroft. The society was committed to gathering and cataloguing species from across [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]]. A branch of the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Exploration Corps/Legends|Exploration Corps]] was also based on the planet. During the war, the Exploration Corps asked the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] to be on the look out for the ''[[Titavian IV]]'', an exploration [[Starship/Legends|vessel]] used by the Intergalactic Zoological Society that had failed to rendezvous at Mycroft. [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] found the ship, adrift after being attacked.<ref name="Rep69" />

During the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] established a ship repair and refueling outpost known as [[Repair Station]] [[M13]] on Mycroft. [[Reekeene's Roughnecks]] deployed [[Green squad]] to attack M13 as part of [[Operation Retribution]]; their mission was to harass the outpost, capture [[Prisoner/Legends|prisoners]] for interrogation, steal any available equipment and supplies, and destroy the facility if possible.<ref name="Assault" />
